name: Woven Boucle Square Throw Pillow with Exposed Zipper - Threshold™
description: Create an interesting look in your home by accenting your resting spot with this Woven Boucle Square Pillow with Exposed Zipper from Threshold™. Beautifully woven, this boucle throw pillow adds textural flair to your seating arrangement. Designed from soft fabric to give you a comfy surface to lean against, this solid-color throw pillow easily integrates into your existing color scheme. Toss it on the sofa, armchair or any other spot to create a perfect relaxing spot.
